query:
UPDATE platform_config 
SET configValue = (SELECT configValue FROM (SELECT configValue FROM platform_config WHERE configKey = 'TWILIO_LIVE_ACCOUNT_SID') AS t),
    description = 'Active Twilio Account SID (currently: live credentials)',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE configKey = 'TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID';

UPDATE platform_config 
SET configValue = (SELECT configValue FROM (SELECT configValue FROM platform_config WHERE configKey = 'TWILIO_LIVE_AUTH_TOKEN') AS t),
    description = 'Active Twilio Auth Token (currently: live credentials)',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE configKey = 'TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN';

UPDATE platform_config 
SET configValue = (SELECT configValue FROM (SELECT configValue FROM platform_config WHERE configKey = 'TWILIO_LIVE_VERIFY_SERVICE_SID') AS t),
    description = 'Active Twilio Verify Service SID (currently: live credentials)',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE configKey = 'TWILIO_VERIFY_SERVICE_SID';

UPDATE platform_config 
SET configValue = (SELECT configValue FROM (SELECT configValue FROM platform_config WHERE configKey = 'TWILIO_LIVE_FROM_NUMBER') AS t),
    description = 'Active Twilio From Phone Number (currently: live credentials)',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE configKey = 'TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER';
